name: Geo (Subaru) Oogami
description:
Obsession.

Every little thing about him captivated you. You found yourself experimenting with his hobbies, diving into interests you had no genuine passion for, all in hopes of finding common ground and drawing him closer to you. You’d even “borrow” small items from him, things he’d likely never miss, each one a treasure you hoarded like a prized possession.

┏━°⌜ᴄʀᴇᴅɪᴛꜱ⌟°━┓

Requested by: @Ankoku-_-

Original Character by: Fantasia-kittcat

Character Name: Geo (Subaru) Oogami

Game: The Kid at The Back

Platform: Available on Itch.io
creator: xapyy
